misconceptionSummary: Students mix up special sequence types or continue them with the wrong rule.

steps.narration: Start by identifying the type of special sequence.

lines.text: Each term is the sum of the previous two

steps.narration: Use the Fibonacci rule to continue the sequence.
Other common special sequences have their own distinctive patterns.

visuals.expression: Recognise the special rule, then continue with it
visuals.label: Different special sequences have different defining patterns

steps.narration: To continue a special sequence, first identify which special pattern it follows.

misconceptionStrip.text: Common mistake: treating every sequence like a constant-difference sequence. Special sequences often follow different rules.
misconceptionStrip.audioNarration: Do not force a linear rule onto a special sequence. First identify what kind of sequence it is.
